command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/fix_hermes_final.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Fix stale .203 URL in auth.json
sed -i 's|192.168.0.203:11434|192.168.0.39:11434|g' /home/jose/.hermes/auth.json
echo auth_json_updated

# Check what port hermes is actually on
ss -tlnp
curl -s http://localhost:9119/health 2>/dev/null || echo no_health_9119
curl -s http://localhost:8000/health 2>/dev/null || echo no_health_8000

# Check gateway config for API settings
grep -A10 gateway /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml | head -20
SHEOF
bash /tmp/fix_hermes_final.sh"
